name: b2b-ecommerce-api
description: B2B ecommerce REST API (Express + PostgreSQL + Prisma)

scripts.free:port: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p=$env:PORT; if(!$p){$p=3001}; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host ('Port ' + $p + ' freed')"
